codeReview.summary: The feature fixes the targeted gate blocker by replacing the brittle absolute docs path in tests/app.test.ts with repository-root-relative resolution while preserving the same existence and content assertions. The change is narrowly scoped, matches the feature intent, and does not weaken the tested contract.

summary: Reviewed commit 8dcb30d, the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, trust-slice worker skill, mission AGENTS guidance, services manifest, and the affected test/docs files. I found no high-confidence correctness issues; the repo-root-safe path resolution is appropriate and contract-preserving.
